aboutIntro.title: Arab Urban Development Institute
aboutIntro.description: Founded in 1980 and headquartered in Riyadh, the Arab Urban Development Institute is a non-profit organization dedicated to research and training in urban development, supporting Arab cities and municipalities in meeting the challenges of sustainable urban growth.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: A leading global institution contributing to a better urban future based on innovation and partnership between cities and development agencies in the Arab world.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Supporting Arab cities and municipalities in facing urban development challenges through studies, training programs, and promoting a culture of cooperation and shared learning.

stats.title: The Institute in Numbers
stats.subtitle: A leading global institution contributing to creating a better urban future based on

items.title: Urban Policies
items.description: Developing urban policy studies and reports that support decision-makers in Arab cities and promote sustainable urban planning.

items.title: Training & Capacity Building
items.description: Specialized training programs to build the capabilities of municipal staff and urban institutions across the Arab world.

items.title: Partnerships
items.description: Building strategic partnerships with cities and regional and international institutions to support shared urban development.

mediaCenter.title: Media Center
mediaCenter.subtitle: Explore our news, periodic newsletter, and audiovisual publications.

slides.title: Institute Director Participates in Al-Futtaim Dialogue Session on..
slides.description: Join us at the Urban Development Conference hosted by the Arab Urban Development Institute, featuring leading experts and decision-makers discussing key challenges and opportunities in Arab cities.

slides.title: UAE Urban Contractors League Opens with Municipal Leadership Participation
slides.description: The UAE Urban Contractors League launched with broad participation from municipal leaders and specialists in urban development.

slides.title: Institute Holds Annual Meeting of Arab Municipal Cooperation Network
slides.description: The Arab Urban Development Institute held its annual meeting of the Arab Municipal Cooperation Network to discuss strengthening integration among Arab cities.

slides.title: New Initiative Launched to Support Sustainable Urban Planning in Arab Cities
slides.description: The Arab Urban Development Institute announced a new initiative to strengthen municipal capacities in sustainable urban planning across the Arab world.

headerSlides.title: Knowledge Center

headerSlides.title: Mudununa
headerSlides.description: A periodic newsletter published by the Arab Urban Development Institute, highlighting urban development issues and practices in Arab cities.
